scripts.build: corepack pnpm run build:main && corepack pnpm run build:renderer
scripts.dev: sh -c "corepack pnpm run build:main && (corepack pnpm run dev:renderer > /tmp/ai-writing-studio-desktop-vite.log 2>&1 & vite_pid=$!; trap 'if [ -n \"$vite_pid\" ]; then kill $vite_pid 2>/dev/null || true; fi' EXIT; sleep 2; DESKTOP_RENDERER_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 corepack pnpm run dev:electron)"
